pages.text:
UNITED NATIONS - ORGANISATION DES NATIONS UNIES

No. 29871

CERTIFICATE of REGISTRATION

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS has been has been registered with the Secretar ter at accordance ent registered with rticle 102 of the Charter of the United Nations:

in accordance with

CERTIFICAT d'ENREGISTREMENT

Le SECRETAIRE GENERAL de 'ORGANISATION des NATIONS UNIES

No. 21837. FRANCE AND TOGO:

Agreement for the establishment of a main joint commission.

Signed at Lomé on'

23 March

Registered by France on 12 April 1983-

NO 21837. FRANCE ET TOGO :

Acsotome oreans marat 1976'une srande commi ss 1on mi xte.

Signé

Enregistré par la France le 12 avril..1983.

UNITED NATIONS

Le Conseiller juridique:

Done at New York on 11 November

1986

For the

SECRETARY-GENERAL

Fait à New York le 11 novembre 1986

Pour le SECRETAIRE GENERAL

The Legal Counsel
